name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

interface.shortDescription: Official SigNoz skills for docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts
interface.longDescription: Installs the official SigNoz skills for using SigNoz docs, writing ClickHouse queries, generating observability queries, and creating, explaining, and modifying dashboards and alerts in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use SigNoz to help me find the right docs page for OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
Use SigNoz to write a ClickHouse query for a SigNoz dashboard panel over traces or logs.
Use SigNoz to create a dashboard for monitoring my service.
Use SigNoz to set up an alert when error rate exceeds a threshold.
